name: Naviga Life
tagline: Practical compression therapy for vascular and lymphatic care
about:
Naviga Life supplies sequential compression systems for clinician-directed care at home and in clinical settings. The range supports people managing lymphedema, chronic venous insufficiency, varicose veins, venous ulcers, and deep vein thrombosis risk.

The catalogue includes arm, leg, and foot configurations from four to eight chambers. Clear pressure controls, timed cycles, and multiple garment options help clinicians match a device to the prescribed treatment plan.

Naviga Life also focuses on circulation support for diabetic-foot and amputation-prevention programs, post-surgical upper-limb swelling, and chronic edema associated with filariasis. Device selection and treatment settings should always be guided by a qualified clinician.
